nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Prisma client singleton for the db package, memoized on the global object outside production to survive dev hot-reload without exhausting database connections, and re-exports all generated Prisma types and enums for use across the monorepo.
nodes.languageNotes: Classic Node/Prisma singleton pattern: stash the client on globalThis in dev so hot-reload doesn't spawn a new PrismaClient (and new connection pool) on every file change.

nodes.name: products.ts
nodes.summary: Hand-written demo catalog data providing extra cars plus a full phone and laptop roster (with per-spec numeric/text/bool values), satisfying CLAUDE.md's requirement to seed 4 cars, 4 phones, and 2 laptops with complete specs out of the box.

nodes.name: spec-definitions.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the full SpecDefinition catalogs (label, unit, data type, visualization, priority weight, sort order) for the cars, phones, and laptops demo categories, exposed per-category via SPEC_DEFINITIONS_BY_CATEGORY.
nodes.languageNotes: The car SpecDefinition set is deliberately kept in sync with the rounds in examples/comparison-example.json so the video payload seed and this catalog seed upsert the same rows rather than diverging.

nodes.name: seed.ts
nodes.summary: Database seed script run via `pnpm db:seed`: loads examples/comparison-example.json to upsert the cars category, its SpecDefinitions, Products, and Comparison, then seeds the additional cars, phones, and laptops demo catalogs — all as idempotent upserts keyed by natural keys per CLAUDE.md's idempotent-jobs directive.

nodes.name: upsertSpecDefinitions
nodes.summary: Upserts a category's list of SpecDefinition seed rows and returns a Map from spec key to the persisted SpecDefinition record so callers can look up spec def ids by key.

nodes.name: seedDemoProduct
nodes.summary: Upserts one hand-authored demo Product, its Brand, and each of its SpecValue rows for a given category; deliberately skips creating a ProductImage since these catalog rows have no licensed image asset yet.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point of the seed script: loads the example video payload, upserts the cars category/SpecDefinitions/Products/Comparison from it, then seeds the phones and laptops categories from the demo catalogs, logging a summary of what was seeded.
